utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format. Now check each in the final package:
1) destination: Present and specific (Budapest, Hungary) — fully specified.
2) travel_dates: Present with specific dates (Oct 25-29, 2024) — fully specified.
3) transportation: Includes route, times, dates, confirmation, and cost — fully specified.
4) accommodation: Includes hotel name, address, check-in/out, booking ref, cost — fully specified.
5) activities: Listed with dates and costs, plus total — fully specified.
6) additional_services: Mentions safety coordination and sharing itinerary to parents — includes emails but no explicit costs; still acceptable as it says “any extra services with costs” and if no cost applies, specification of the service is provided. Considered fully specified.
7) total_budget: Provides total and breakdown with categories and amounts — fully specified.
All 7 items are included and complete according to the required details.
